name: Hudson Golf
about: Hudson Golf is a golf simulator venue that combines a high-tech practice facility with a full-service bar and kitchen. It utilizes TrackMan technology for its golf simulations, providing a premium indoor golfing experience. The venue is suitable for individual practice, group events, and corporate gatherings, offering a relaxed yet professional atmosphere with a focus on both game improvement and socializing. Membership options are available for regular users, while the space is also designed to accommodate one-time visitors and large group rentals.
why_golfers_like_it: High-quality TrackMan simulators with detailed data and course variety
Spacious and comfortable simulator bays for an enjoyable experience
Ability to host events with attentive service and quality food and drinks
On-site coaching and club fitting services for game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with a diverse menu, including appetizers, burgers, tacos, and fried foods.
Full bar service with beer, cocktails, and wine; happy hour specials available Monday-Friday.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator hardware, used for its high accuracy and course simulation.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available on-site for those who do not have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted, as Hudson Golf offers a full kitchen and bar with a variety of options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players and simulator availability.

faq.question: Is Hudson Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Hudson Golf is a family-friendly venue that welcomes players of all ages and skill levels.
